title: [Brazh] Demon Slayer Henshū 02 - Les premières missions - 1080p.MULTI.x264
description:
# **Demon Slayer Henshū 02 - Les premières missions**
#
![](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/fan-kai/images/3/3b/Demon_slayer_henshu_affiche_02.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/1000?cb=20240418144612&path-prefix=fr)


#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
**Demon Slayer Henshū** est une relecture de l'animé Demon Slayer qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. 
Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d’obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.

Les sources utilisées pour le montage viennent de S3rnx pour la vidéo et l'audio en japonais, de T3kashi pour l'audio en français et les sous-titres, mais également de Tenrai-Sensei pour tous les kanjis qui ont été adaptés/traduits. Merci à eux ! 

Le torrent contient également le pack de métadonnées (fichiers .NFO + .PNG) pour que le rendu soit optimal avec nos productions sur Plex, Jellyfin... ([le tutoriel est disponible ici](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Plex)). Vous n'êtes pas obligés de le télécharger.

# **SYNOPSIS**
Dans le Japon de l'ère Taisho, le bienveillant Tanjiro Kamado gagne sa vie en vendant du charbon de bois. Mais sa vie paisible est brisée lorsqu'un démon massacre toute sa famille.
Sa petite sœur Nezuko est la seule survivante, mais elle a elle-même été transformée en démon ! Tanjiro se lance dans un voyage dangereux pour trouver un moyen de ramener sa sœur à la normale et de détruire le démon qui a ruiné sa vie.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ce premier film couvre les épisodes **6 à 10**, soit les chapitres **10 à 19** du manga.
[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Demon Slayer.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Demon_Slayer_Hensh%C5%AB)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.com/servers/team-fankai-414117314418704414 "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autre anime, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

## **INFOS UPLOAD**

An era can only support a few people to gain the Tao. But I found that even Dao It’s also hard to escape bad luck. There is a ruler above them, harvesting one era after another, and the cultivators of the world want to maintain their ambitions. title: [Beatrice-Raws] Tonari no Totoro / My Neighbor Totoro [DCPrip 1998x1080 HEVC TrueHD].mkv
description:
#### Encoder(s): Jensen
---

Format: HEVC 
Format profile: Main 10@L4@Main 
Duration: 1 h 26 min 
Bit rate: 43.1 Mb/s 
Width: 1 998 pixels 
Height: 1 080 pixels 
Display aspect ratio: 1.85:1 
Frame rate: 24.000 FPS 
Color space: YUV 
Chroma subsampling: 4:2:0 (Type 2) 
Bit depth: 10 bits 
Bits/(Pixel*Frame): 0.832
Stream size: 26.0 GiB (79%)
Title: DCPrip by Jensen 
Color range: Limited 
Color primaries: BT.2020 
Transfer characteristics: BT.2020 (10-bit) 
Matrix coefficients: BT.2020 non-constant 

Release notes: *You can consider this release as a kind of archival copy in a form adapted for modern TV devices. DCP is based on the same all previously released BDs - film scanning. But in the case of DCP, we are dealing with a high-bitrate source with a CIE 1931 color space. The Rec.2020 color space can reproduce colors that cannot be shown with the Rec.709 color space. The RGB primaries used by Rec.2020 are equivalent to monochromatic light sources on the CIE 1931 spectral locus. The wavelength of the Rec.2020 primary colors is 630 nm for the red primary color, 532 nm for the green primary color, and 467 nm for the blue primary color. In coverage of the CIE 1931 color space, the Rec.2020 color space covers 75.8%, the DCI-P3 digital cinema color space covers 53.6%, the Adobe RGB color space covers 52.1%, and the Rec.709 color space covers 35.9%. Quite often DCPs are based on Rec.709 for older films. But in this case, the colors are clearly P3 and maybe even a little higher, I was not able to find out more precisely. So I decided to use the same loophole in the standards that Toho uses for its UHD BDs. It was also used by Khara studio to create Evangelion 3.0+1.11 UHD BD. SDR Rec.2020 encoding. So I converted CIE 1931 color space to Rec.2020. In addition, when dealing with such source material, I tried to preserve the grain and detail of the image as much as possible. And I got rid of the unpleasant "pulp" yellowish tint of the Rec.709 versions of this film
The final picture replicates my experience of watching this film on the big screen in the cinema. All together it looks amazing on my OLED. I doubt we'll ever get anything better than DCP, given the aging of film and its current state in general. But maybe someday there will be a re-scan to 4K and HDR grading. Let's see.* 

#### Subtitles: 

| Author| Language| Format  |
| ------- |:------------------:| -----:| -----:|
| nedragrevev | ENG | ASS |
| CC GKIDS DCP | ENG | pgs |

#### Audio: 

| Author| Language| Format  |
| ------- |:------------------:| -----:| -----:|
| DCP_Audio 5.0 | ENG / JPN| TrueHD Dolby Digital |
| BD_Audio 2.0 | JPN | DTS-HD TrueHD Dolby Digital |

#### The torrent has been re-uploaded. The video has been updated to use updated encoding from a new DCP. A theatrical Japanese 5.0 audio mix has also been added.

Telegram: https://t.me/BeatriceRaws | Discord: https://discord.gg/Hry7EkU

**Language Options**
You can [download here](https://mega.nz/folder/kcQhWZCA#c4wfvx2RXI9XN8XeBso09g) two scripts that do the following (Windows/macOS-Linux):

- *Keep Japanese*: Throws out all audio tracks other than Japanese
- *Keep English*: Throws out all audio and subtitles tracks other than English

Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script. The resulting files can be found in the *output* folder.

Note: [MKVToolNix](https://mkvtoolnix.download/downloads.html) must be installed on your system

title: [Weeaboo-Shogun] Shinkalion Change the World 19
description:
WEEABOO SHOGUN PRESENTS
Shinkalion: Change the World
Episode 19
"New Encounters"

Taisei meets a new, talented Metaverse designer named Delta and strikes up a friendship. As Team Shinkalion reviews their recent battle with the Hades Shinkalion, they also make plans to attend the summer festival.

NOTES:
There's a translation that wouldn't make sense that I made make sense. In the scene where they're taking a picture, Ryota actually asks, "What's one plus one?" and the answer is, "Ni!" (two).

This is a common way to get people to smile in pictures, similar to how saying "cheese" does it in English speaking countries, though some people do say "Cheese" in Japan.

NGT48として10枚目の節目となる今作では、清司麗菜、奈良未遥、西潟茉莉奈のグループを支えてきた１期生メンバーの他、昨年12月に研究生から正規メンバーに昇格した3期生の北村優羽、水津菜月、杉本萌と、同じく昨年12月にお披露目された4期生の中でもダンススキルの高さが話題となっている磯崎菜々の4人が選抜メンバーに抜擢されるなど、新生NGT48をイメージさせる全11名の選抜メンバーによる作品となっている。さらに、センターにはドラフト3期生の藤崎未夢、2期生の大塚七海、小越春花の３名による初のトリプルセンターとなることも発表された。

***

**Isekai Yururi Kikou: Kosodate Shinagara Boukensha Shimasu | 異世界ゆるり紀行 ~子育てしながら冒険者します~ | A Journey Through Another World: Raising Kids While Adventuring | Iseyuru | Приключения в другом мире: Воспитывать детей будучи авантюристом [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** повседневность, фэнтези
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 09 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 08.07.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [EMT Squared](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=17847)
**Снято по ранобэ:** [Приключения в другом мире](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6044)
**Автор оригинала:** [Минадзуки Сидзуру](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=929391)
**Режиссер:** [Нигорикава Ацуси](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=431842)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=11937), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=30905), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18295), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/57380)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [TVShows](https://flex-kino.com)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Бог ветра Сил по ошибке убивает Такуми. В качестве извинений бог отправляет Такуми в мир Этелдия. Однако это малоприятное место, представляющее собой огромный лес, наполненный опасными монстрами... В лесу Такуми находит близнецов — мальчика и девочку. Он беспокоится о малышах, даёт им имена Аллен и Елена и решает заботиться о них. Вскоре оказывается, что дети не так просты и могут победить монстра голыми руками. Добравшись до города, новоиспечённый родитель решает зарегистрироваться в гильдии, чтобы заработать на жизнь. Он начинает свою жизнь как искатель приключений, одновременно заботясь о детях.

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 35 2024 (Digital) (Rillant)
description:
x1378 native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/). 
Spreads joined, otherwise untouched.

**Note:** I forgot to include GALAXIAS 006. Here is a ddl: https://mega.nz/file/rEciQQSB#fSc0cwWV90ee7mbkxXbxpzFwgMFLCQcqThrDSoc5JdE

General info:
* "Why don't you rip X series? Chapter Y of series X already released, where is it?" These rips are purely the series I and JDS personally buy to read for ourselves as well as some series that have the second-most recent chapter available for free. That means that if a K Manga series is not included in these batches, we either don't buy/read it or it doesn't have recent free chapters.
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening except for weeks when a Witch Hat Atelier chapter releases, then the upload is on Wednesday.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* If you want to add your purchases to these batches to share with others, let me know!
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

title: [DB] Haikyuu!! (Season 1-4+OVAs+Movies) [Dual Audio 10bit BD1080p][HEVC-x265]
description:
Haikyuu!! updated for upcoming final 2 movies

Synopsis

Ever since having witnessed the "Little Giant" and his astonishing skills on the volleyball court, Shouyou Hinata has been bewitched by the dynamic nature of the sport. Even though his attempt to make his debut as a volleyball regular during a middle school tournament went up in flames, he longs to prove that his less-than-impressive height ceases to be a hindrance in the face of his sheer will and perseverance.

When Hinata enrolls in Karasuno High School, the Little Giant's alma mater, he believes that he is one step closer to his goal of becoming a professional volleyball player. Although the school only retains a shadow of its former glory, Hinata's conviction isn't shaken until he learns that Tobio Kageyama—the prodigy who humiliated Hinata's middle school volleyball team in a crushing defeat—is now his teammate.

To fulfill his desire of leaving a mark on the realm of volleyball—so often regarded as the domain of the tall and the strong—Hinata must smooth out his differences with Kageyama. Only when Hinata learns what it takes to be a part of a team will he be able to join the race to the top in earnest.

title: [ION] Komi Can't Communicate S02E01-E03 (WEB 1080p) | Komi-san wa, Komyushou Desu
description:
This release is a touched up version of my first fansubbing project I stopped working on 2 years ago. I am unlikely to ever finish it but I saw that some people were interested in doing a full Komi project so I thought I'd upload this so the work doesn't go to waste. If you don't know the story, Komi has an insane amount of signs per episode so it might be nice to yoink 3 episodes worth. If you want to contact me, find me at https://discord.gg/8v9GBnjdsY

---

| **Role**                 | **Credit**                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Raw Source               | Netflix JP (Nandesuka, CameEsp)                                                                                                                                 |
| Translation              | Netflix                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Song Translation         | [Mewsic](https://youtu.be/1cxtg4irU68) Edited (OP),  [Mewsic](https://youtu.be/FN3BqwdHz1E) (ED)                                                                                       |
| Song Styling             | ION                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Timing                   | ION                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Editing                  | ION                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Typesetting              | EchoSubs, Pikari-Teshima, NekoYu' - Team Arcedo, Novaworks |

---

TS is primarily taken from EchoSubs with some signs from NekoYu and Pikari, they were all adapted to English and to fit the NovaWorks style and occasionally modified. Episode 2 and 3 credit the sources of each sign within the ass file. Netflix subs had the best translations 95% of the time but I did have a look at additional TLs including: NekoYu’ - Team Arcedo, Truello, Dub, Viz (manga), Scanlation (manga). I edited the OP lyrics but didn't touch the ED.

Special thanks to Zahuczky and petzku in GJM discord for helping me finalise the OP styling.

[Episode 1 script comp](https://www.diffchecker.com/KDEyJiJ1/)
[Episode 2 script comp](https://www.diffchecker.com/uR37pzzz/)
[Episode 3 script comp](https://www.diffchecker.com/OuutSfvJ/)
[Editor's Notes](https://rentry.co/ION-Komi-Editors-Notes)

title: [Brazh] Demon Slayer Henshū 01 - La sélection finale - 1080p.MULTI.x264
description:
# **Demon Slayer Henshū 01 - La sélection finale**
#
![](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/fan-kai/images/3/38/Demon_slayer_henshu_affiche_01.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/1000?cb=20240418144432&path-prefix=fr)


#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
**Demon Slayer Henshū** est une relecture de l'animé Demon Slayer qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. 
Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d’obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.

Les sources utilisées pour le montage viennent de S3rnx pour la vidéo et l'audio en japonais, de T3kashi pour l'audio en français et les sous-titres, mais également de Tenrai-Sensei pour tous les kanjis qui ont été adaptés/traduits. Merci à eux ! 

Le torrent contient également le pack de métadonnées (fichiers .NFO + .PNG) pour que le rendu soit optimal avec nos productions sur Plex, Jellyfin... ([le tutoriel est disponible ici](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Plex)). Vous n'êtes pas obligés de le télécharger.

# **SYNOPSIS**
Dans le Japon de l'ère Taisho, le bienveillant Tanjiro Kamado gagne sa vie en vendant du charbon de bois. Mais sa vie paisible est brisée lorsqu'un démon massacre toute sa famille.
Sa petite sœur Nezuko est la seule survivante, mais elle a elle-même été transformée en démon ! Tanjiro se lance dans un voyage dangereux pour trouver un moyen de ramener sa sœur à la normale et de détruire le démon qui a ruiné sa vie.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ce premier film couvre les épisodes **1 à 5**, soit les chapitres **1 à 9** du manga.
[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Demon Slayer.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Demon_Slayer_Hensh%C5%AB)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.com/servers/team-fankai-414117314418704414 "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autre anime, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

## **INFOS UPLOAD**
Montage : Brazh
Langues :  ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/jp_JP.png "Japanese") Japonais et ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png "French") Français   
Sous-titres :  ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png "French") Français (VOST ASS & VF ASS)
Durée : 1h27
Format : MKV
Résolution : 1920x1080
